name: Planetary Systems Forge
subtitle: Shaping worlds
introText: Welcome to Planetary Systems Forge. Shaping worlds. This is where your journey continues.
completionText: You have mastered Planetary Systems Forge. The Planetary Cores you've gathered here will echo through every room that follows.
guideIntroLine: We're not just building machines anymore. We're shaping entire systems.

transformationStages.name: Planetary Systems Forge — Bare Bones
transformationStages.description: The room in its raw state. Planetary Systems Forge evolves as you progress.

transformationStages.name: Planetary Systems Forge — Mastered
transformationStages.description: The room at its peak. Planetary Systems Forge evolves as you progress.

midSceneTwist.effectDescription: New mechanics unlock in Planetary Systems Forge. Event rates increase.

roomLaw.name: Law of Scale
roomLaw.mechanic: Larger investments yield exponentially better returns on system production

landmark.name: The World Seed
landmark.description: A metallic sphere that evolves into a miniature planet
evolutionStages: A cold metallic sphere resting in a cradle
Cracks appear as geological processes begin within
Tiny oceans and continents form on the surface
An atmosphere develops and weather patterns emerge
The World Seed blooms into a living, breathing miniature world

hazard.name: Tectonic Instability
hazard.triggerCondition: System expansion rate exceeds geological stability
hazard.penalty: System quakes destroy a portion of recent progress

stabilizer.name: Geological Survey
stabilizer.description: Scanning for faults prevents catastrophic instability
stabilizer.mechanic: Running geological surveys identifies fault lines and prevents quake damage

completionCeremony: The first complete world ignites with life
